nasb.text: And someone said to Him, “Lord, are there just a few who are being saved?” And He said to them,

esv.text: And someone said to him, “Lord, will those who are saved be few?” And he said to them,

cnv.text: 有一個人問他：“主啊，是不是只有很少的人得救呢？”他對眾人說：

ccb.text: 有人问祂：“主啊，得救的人是否很少呢？”耶稣对他们说：

csbs.text: 有一个人问他：“主啊，得救的人很少吗？” 耶稣对他们说：
